title: Checker Output
description: Checker evaluation of maker-generated test scenarios.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for the pipeline run that produced this output.

case_id.description: ID of the scenario being reviewed.

semantic_rule_id.description: ID of the semantic rule this case was generated from.

case_type.description: Type of test case as declared by maker.

case_type_accepted.description: Whether the checker accepts the declared case_type as appropriate.

coverage_relevance.description: How directly this case covers its semantic rule.

overall_status.description: Overall pass/fail assessment of this case.

blocking_findings_count.description: Number of blocking findings that prevent approval.

is_blocking.description: Whether this case has any blocking issues.

non_hallucination.description: Score for hallucination risk (1-5, higher = less risk).

findings.description: List of specific findings from the checker review.

coverage_assessment.description: Coverage assessment for this case against its semantic rule.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the coverage status.

missing_aspects.description: Aspects of the semantic rule not covered by this case.
